column1: The cat ran away___________it saw the dog.
We____________to the park on Saturdays, but now we go swimming.
We were surprised__________we saw Mum on television.
The children played in the garden____________it got dark.
We played in the park____________it got dark.
The mouse ran away_____________it saw the cat.
First he had dinner,_________he listened to the radio.
I was surprised____________I saw Mr Adams or television.
I_________________to the gum on Saturdays, but now I go to the park.
